name: 懸念反轉型（繼兄妹揭曉）
description: 在中段集末，男女主剛建立好感時突然揭曉父母即將結婚、兩人將成為繼兄妹，瞬間將浪漫氣氛推入冰點，驅動觀眾繼續觀看以了解他們如何破局。

examples.drama_title: 💗No One Dared Kiss the Bully CEO—Until a Rural Girl Did,Then He Can’t Stop Spoiling Her!#drama #ceo
examples.excerpt: We're going to be step siblings, aren't we? / There shouldn't be any romance between us.
